packages.name: core
packages.notes: Type conversion, toString, typeof

packages.notes: Array push/pop/sort, map/filter

packages.notes: abs, min, max, pow, sqrt, floor, ceil, round, randint

packages.name: text
packages.notes: len, upper, lower, trim, contains, replace, substring, split, format

packages.name: time
packages.notes: time(), sleep() via Python time

packages.name: json
packages.notes: parse, stringify, pretty, valid via Python json

packages.name: files
packages.notes: read, write, exists, mkdir, list_dir, remove via Python os

packages.name: system
packages.notes: hostname, platform, arch, env, pid via Python platform

packages.name: process
packages.notes: Shell execution stubs exist; not fully verified

packages.name: net
packages.notes: local_ip, ping, port_check, dns via Python socket

packages.name: http
packages.notes: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/request via Python urllib; E2E verified

packages.name: web
packages.notes: Real HTTP server; routes, path params, health, POST echo, 404 handling

packages.name: database
packages.notes: SQLite open/exec/query/close via Python sqlite3

packages.name: storage
packages.notes: storage_open/read/write via Python file I/O

packages.name: crypto
packages.notes: sha256, hmac, random_bytes, uuid via Python hashlib

packages.name: security
packages.notes: audit_secrets, sanitize via Python re; web security tests

packages.name: logging
packages.notes: debug, info, warn, error via selfhost

packages.name: cli
packages.notes: CLI argument parsing via selfhost; version/doctor/run/check/build

packages.name: testing
packages.notes: test(), assert functions via selfhost

packages.name: concurrent
packages.notes: Thread spawning exists; channels/result propagation PARTIAL

packages.name: async
packages.notes: Task scheduling exists; true overlap/cancellation not verified

packages.name: ai
